name: jb-directory
description: Juicebox Protocol Directory — static IPFS interface to all v6 contracts

scripts.build: npm run sync-deployments && npm run extract-sources && npm run generate && npm run bundle
scripts.dev: npm run sync-deployments && npm run extract-sources && npm run generate && npm run bundle -- --watch
scripts.check: npm run deps:check && npm run audit:prod && npm run test:ci
scripts.check:generated: npm run sync-deployments && npm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- data/abis data/manifest.json data/deployments.json src/abi-registry.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run check:source && npm run check:deployments && npm run check:generated && npm run transaction:check && npm run bundle && npm run test:coverage && npm run check:bundle && npm run test:browser
